tasks.title: Build watchmebuildai.com
tasks.description: Build the complete watchmebuildai.com static site — landing page, subscription flow via Polar.sh, Zoom-linked session calendar, subscriber email reminders via Brevo, member portal (recorded sessions), and admin interface for managing sessions.
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Build the full watchmebuildai.com platform: a static marketing site that converts Stage 1 AIStudio.com visitors into $100/month Stage 2 subscribers. Polar.sh handles billing; a PHP webhook at /webhooks/polar.php activates subscriber access records and syncs contacts to Brevo. Live sessions run on Zoom; the join link is visible on the session calendar to logged-in subscribers only. Brevo sends the Zoom link via email before each session.

## Stack
- HTML/CSS/JS static landing page on Mocahost
- PHP webhook + PHP session auth (no framework)
- Polar.sh for billing (existing contract)
- Zoom for live sessions
- Brevo for transactional + reminder emails
- Google Analytics for tracking

## Phases

1. Infrastructure and Manual Setup - Polar.sh product, Brevo list + templates, Zoom account (all manual, no code)
2. PHP Webhook - /webhooks/polar.php handles Polar.sh lifecycle events, activates/deactivates subscriber record, syncs Brevo
3. Auth - email magic-link login: subscriber enters email, PHP checks active record, sends Brevo login link, sets session cookie
4. Landing Page - Hero, value prop, Stage 2 framing, Polar.sh CTA, public session calendar (dates/titles only)
5. Admin Interface - Password-protected PHP page to manage session schedule (date, title, Zoom link) and recordings
6. Member Portal - Session calendar with Zoom links + recorded session library (gated by PHP session)
7. Deploy and End-to-End Validation - Full subscriber flow test

proofUnits.title: Polar.sh subscription is live
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: The Polar.sh checkout URL shows the $100/month subscription with 7-day free trial.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to Polar.sh checkout URL. 2. Verify product name, price ($100/month), and trial (7 days). 3. Confirm webhook endpoint is set to https://watchmebuildai.com/webhooks/polar.php. 4. Record HMAC secret.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No Polar.sh product configured; checkout URL returns 404.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Checkout shows correct product and pricing; webhook URL saved in Polar.sh dashboard.

proofUnits.title: Polar.sh webhook activates subscriber record and syncs Brevo
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: On subscription.created, polar.php verifies HMAC signature, writes active subscriber record to /data/subscribers.json, and Brevo onboarding email is sent.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Deploy polar.php. 2. Use Polar.sh dashboard to send test event (subscription.created). 3. Verify HTTP 200 response. 4. Confirm /data/subscribers.json contains subscriber entry with status active. 5. Confirm new contact in Brevo list. 6. Confirm Brevo onboarding email received.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /webhooks/polar.php returns 404 or HMAC check fails; subscribers.json not written; Brevo call fails.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: HTTP 200; subscribers.json updated; Brevo contact created; onboarding email received.

proofUnits.title: Magic-link login grants subscriber session
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Subscriber enters email on login page, receives Brevo magic-link email, clicks link, and gets a PHP session cookie granting portal access.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to /login. 2. Enter test subscriber email. 3. Confirm Brevo magic-link email received within 30 seconds. 4. Click link — confirm redirect to /portal/ with session cookie set. 5. Repeat with non-subscriber email — confirm not-a-subscriber message shown.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Login page returns 404; no email sent; session not set; non-subscriber not rejected.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Magic-link email arrives; click sets session cookie; non-subscriber sees error message.

proofUnits.title: Landing page renders and subscribe CTA works
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Landing page loads with all sections visible, subscribe CTA links to Polar.sh checkout, and public calendar shows upcoming session dates/titles without Zoom links.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Open https://watchmebuildai.com as logged-out visitor. 2. Verify hero, value prop, and pricing sections render. 3. Click Subscribe CTA — confirm Polar.sh checkout opens. 4. Verify public calendar shows session dates and titles. 5. Confirm no Zoom links visible. 6. DevTools Console — no JavaScript errors.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Site returns 404; CTA links to wrong URL; Zoom links visible to public; console errors.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: All sections render; CTA links to Polar.sh; public calendar shows dates only; no console errors.

proofUnits.title: Admin interface saves session and recording data
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Scott can log into /admin/, add a session entry with Zoom link, and it appears in sessions.json and on the subscriber calendar.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to https://watchmebuildai.com/admin/. 2. Enter password — confirm access. 3. Add test session (date, title, description, Zoom link). 4. Submit — verify entry in /data/sessions.json with Zoom link. 5. Log into /portal/ as subscriber — confirm Zoom link visible. 6. Load landing page as logged-out — confirm Zoom link NOT visible.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /admin/ returns 404; no password protection; save.php fails to write JSON; Zoom link exposed publicly.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Login works; session saves with Zoom link; subscriber sees link; public does not.

proofUnits.title: Member portal gates by subscription status
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: A subscriber with a valid PHP session sees the session calendar with Zoom links; a non-subscriber or logged-out user is redirected to the landing page.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to https://watchmebuildai.com/portal/ without session cookie — confirm redirect to /. 2. Log in as active subscriber via magic link. 3. Verify session calendar shows Zoom links. 4. Clear session cookie. 5. Confirm redirect back to /.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /portal/ returns 404; no redirect for logged-out users; Zoom links visible without login.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Logged-out users redirected; subscriber sees Zoom links; clearing cookie re-triggers redirect.

proofUnits.title: Full end-to-end subscriber flow
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: New user completes entire journey from landing page to Zoom session access without manual intervention from Scott.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Open https://watchmebuildai.com as fresh visitor. 2. Click Start Free Trial — complete Polar.sh checkout. 3. Verify Brevo onboarding email arrives. 4. Navigate to /login — enter test email — receive magic-link — click — confirm portal access with Zoom link. 5. Confirm Brevo session reminder email arrives before scheduled session. 6. Simulate subscription.canceled in Polar.sh — confirm subscribers.json status set to inactive. 7. Attempt portal login — confirm access denied.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Any step fails; onboarding email not sent; portal inaccessible; canceled subscriber retains access.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: All 7 steps complete without error; Scott takes no manual action at any step.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Step 5 session reminder: test by setting reminder offset to 1 minute and scheduling a session 1 minute out.
